subject: INBOX then coordinate: Organizer Onboarding via TangoTiempo
body: From Ybotman via Telegram: Run INBOX first. Then coordinate with Sarah, Fulton, and Gotan on the next mission: Automated organizer onboarding through the TangoTiempo link. The goal is to bring organizers into the calendar system automatically. Your role: how does AI-discovered data feed into the onboarding process? How do discovered organizers get invited/linked? Reply with your readiness and what you need from others.
